text: Snowball Fight
circa 8 ABY-9 ABY
Morganna Tazecks
Caspar
Morganna Tazecks, Kadgie Rodo, Troy McTavish, Kaley Recourua, Dracolysk, Stelita, Morrison Van Sen
Caspian Union
Never throw a snowball at Morganna.

Looking completely out of place in the white snow, the dark robed%rfigure stumbles through. Hey, it must be the night for getting%rcompletely drunk and then stumbling along aimlessly. The being leans%ragainst the IGnews terminal and reads the headlines.

Troy turns around steam rising from his now soaked head. he thinks its not that cold out, then his body responds with a shiver. Trying to shake some of the water from his hair, he then realizes his hair is kinda frozen. he attempts to Stand, with uneasy legs he decides he should sit awhile longer.

Rodo shakes his head, blows on his hands, while rubbing them. He looks%raround the square, his breath leaving a white misty cloud everytime he%rexhales. He mumbles something about how he isn't used to such cold%rweather.

It has been so long since Morganna has been completely inebriated,%rand, well, she doesn't really mind it all that much. There's that%rtoasty warm feeling this time, and she doesn't really mind the snow.%rThat could be because she has a warm cloak on, protecting her from the%relements. She sighs and a pang of depression hits her, in turn she%rkicks the news terminal, hard...

Troy seeing the cloaked figure kick at the terminal, he laughs "Well%rsure kick a news terminal.." with that he bends down and picks up some%rsnow...casualy forming a snowball "It ain't gonna kick back." His hair%ris rather funny looking with the ice jell taking hold.
Rodo glances over at the figure kicking the terminal. "Hey!" he shouts%rat the cloaked figure "Don't do that...it's public property!" He%rshakes his head "Someones always got to make trouble...."

The cloaked figure moves away from the terminal and clenches its%rgloved fists, white puffs rapidly escape from beneath the hood, and if%ranyone's close enough, the puffs smell like alcohol. "Fine." she%rsneers, in a completely different voice than either Rodo or Troy would%rrecognize.

Troy laughs a little, it seems its been Troy's turn to cause trouble%ranyways lately. He takes aim with the snowball, and lets fly aiming%rfor the Marine, but in his drunken state the snowball kinda flys in%ranother direction. The snowball slams into the back of the hooded%rambassador. A simple little Phrase escapes Troy's lips "Oppps.."

Rodo watches as the snowball slams into the ambassador. He chuckles a%rlittle, and regains his composure. He looks around the square at%rwhoever threw it. Not being able to figure it out, he shakes his head%rand walks away towards the south.
Dracolysk walks along the street slowly, one hand clutching his%rattache case the other thrust into a pocket. He whistles a mindless%rtune as he glances about

First assassination attempts, then the only person she's cared for%rdisappearing, and now snowballs. Without shaking the snow off her%rhood, the cloaked ambassador lithely races towards Troy, growling and%rleaping in the air towards Troy. She connects with the mane none too%rgently and the pair skid in the snow for several metres, crashing into%ra bench. There must be some ice under there. The momentum causes The%rambassador's hood to fall even moreso over her face, obscuring it%rcompletely, and her fingers dig into Troy's shoulders.

Dracolysk pauses in his wanderings as a flurry of commotion grabs his%rattention. Turning his head he watches the scene as Morganna and Troy%rtake a tumble in the snow. A smile creases his face, which quickly%rdevelops into a grin and then a light chuckle. "People just have it in%rfor you, don't they My Friend!" He calls out, his hand strays to his%rIR-5 as he continues on a more serious note, "You wouldn't need any%rhelp there would you?"

Troy yells in some kind of sick joy as they go sliding on the fresh%rsnow "weeeeee". He Grunts as they hit the bench, "oooofh", as Morgs%rClaws dig into his shoulder he almost wants to make some kind of%rsound, but since he's pretty numb from the whiskey. He pretty much%rthinks this is a game, and Grabs for some of the fresh snow, taking a%rhandfull and rubbing it in Morg's face. There seems to be snow flying%rall over the place as he throughs more and more snow at her.

Dracolysk drops his hand away from his peice as Troy doesn't give the%rimpresson of being in trouble and the grin resumes its place on his%rface. "Thats something you don't see everyday." He mutters to himself%ras he cautiously takes a few steps towards Morganna and Troy.

Kaley shuffles up to the edge of the square and pauses to look at the%rgathering crowd. Her curiousity is perked and she pushes through to%rsee what is going on. As her pale green eyes spy that of her%rambassador friend, she begins to laugh. "Morganna?" She calls over to%rthe snow covered pair, that lie not too far away. "What in the galaxy%rare you doing?"
Stelita wanders into the square, glancing around for farmiliar faces,%rnot slowing at all. Seeing Morganna and Troy, she shifts her course%rand heads towards the pair.

Well, Morganna isn't having fun, and this is obvious from the hunter%rambassador's next motion, she grips Troy tightly as she snarlss.. then%rflips over so he's on top of her, lifts her legs and sends the drunk%rlittle pupp soaring like a flightless bird towards a snowbank. To%rcomplete the fluid motion, Morganna rises to her feet, stumbling a%rlittle for she, too, is drunk.. but is good at fighting when%rinebrieated. As though nothing happened, she dusts the snow off her%rcape, unaware that her hood is down, and her face exposed.. Oops, is%rthis a diplomatic faux pas?%rAnd isn't she supposed to be /off/ planet?
Morrison is standing at the end of Fountain square smoking a cigarette%rin the blowing snow. He is headed toward the Sand bar to take refuge%rfrom the cold.
Stelita laughs as she sees Troy take a...flying leap? towards the snow%rbank, grinning at Morganna. "Well done, i must say..."

Dracolysk places his Attache Case under one arm and then applauds%rMorganna's swift move to send Troy flying and gives a polite bow%rtowards her. "Very neatly done." He comments, the grin remaining on%rhis face. As his claps cease he takes the attache case once more into%rhis hand and then sends a quick glance towards Troy.

Troy landing feet first. he stumbles into the snowbank. but by some%rgrace of some god he does not fall. Instead he gets an evil grin, Must%rbe that evil nature he's been oppresing for way to long. He reaches%rdown, and compacts another snowball. He goes into the wind up and%rthroughs it at Morgs, Amazingly he hits, <SPLAT!!> Spraying Snow all%rover her face. Also getting Those close to her, Stelita.

Kaley rushes over to Morganna before she can react to Troy's latest%rattack. "Ambassador Tazecks!" She grabs the woman's arm to make sure%rshe has her full attention. "I need to speak with you a moment." She%rlooks quickly for a hide away spot. "Perhaps behind that tree?"%rPutting them out of range for Troy.

My my my, someone in the square has a death wish. Troy is very lucky%rthat Morganna can't use the force. or he'd probably be suffering from%ra severe lack of oxygen right now. Instead, Morganna has to handle%rthese things the old fashioned way. She reaches inside her cloak%rtowards that vibroblade... but thankfully for troy, her arm is snatched by Kaley. Morganna shoots a glare towards the woman, with an%ralmost pleading 'Aww, let me at him? I need a new scalp for my collection' puppy dog look to her eyes. She snorts and growls, her%rbreath smells of alcohol, "What?" she seems reluctant to move away.

Stelita looks shocked for a moment, before quickly recovering.%rglancing at Morganna, she grins, realising she alone gets to deal with%rher brother. With a devilish grin of her own, she bends, making her%rown snowball which she quickly launches at Troy.

Dracolysk shrugs to himself as Morganna is dragged away from the fight%rand reaches into his jacket, retrieveing from it a silver cherrot%rcase. Selecting one of the thin black cheroots he places it in his%rmouth and returns the case to his jackets interior pocket before%rpatting himself down to find his lighter. Failing to find it he%rglances about, spots Morrison and makes his way over. "Could I borrow%ryour light for a moment?" He asks politely as he nears the smoking%rman.

Troy noticing the movement Morganna was just about to make was not%rgonna be a friendly one, he is relived at Kales intervention. As he%rwatches the Two vanish behind a tree, he gets <SMACKED> upside the%rhead with a snow ball. He searches for the attacker, seeing its his%rsister. He Grins <evily, must be a family trait> he shouts out some%rwhat sluured at his Sister "Heya Stel i got a present for you!!"%rGrabbing a handfull of snow he rushes at her. While he runs he losses%rhis footing and Takes out Drack, and contiues to slide right into his%rSister. Spraying snow all over the place.

Kaley tugs on Morganna's arm, almost pulling her out of the square. "I%rwould like to speak with you." Her words are slow and purposeful, and at the end she adds a "Now" in a low tone. Apparently the small%rstatured Sarian isn't going to give up with the diplomat, and doesn't%rstop until they are behind that tree. "What -are- you doing?"

The reluctant and tipsy diplomat is dragged, very much against her%rwill, behind the tree. The effect is something like a puppy being%rscolded for piddling on the carpet, but Morganna is one hell of a%rpuppy. SHe snarls and motions to Troy, "I'm trying to enjoy my holiday%rand he threw a fnarkin' snowball at me.." she tries to keep her voice%rlow, but it doesn't work too well.

As a consequence of Troy's actions Hugo Dracolysk falls face foward%rinto the ground, his suit getting covered in snow and his cheroot%rgetting squashed beyond repair. As he stands he brushes himself down%rmuttering curses before he notices his crushed cheroot. Pausing for%rseveral moments he glowers at Troy and calls out, "YOU SON OF A SITH!"

Stelita lets out a little yelp as she's bowled over by Troy and%rDracolysk bowl her over. Reaching a hand down to scoop up a handfull%rof snow, giving him a good face wash. Looking up at Hugo, she winks.%r"Your turn..."

Kaley nods slowly at Morganna's words, like that of a mother to a%rchild. "And you handled the situation diplomaticly, correct?" She%rwaits for the answer, with her arms crossed across her chest. "Like%ryou position and job, imply you would?"

Morganna narrows her organic eye and turns away from Kaley, "Oh%rplease, you're not my mother..." the ambassador snarls and cracks her%rknuckles, "I'm not in the best of moods, okay? And.. Thanks for%rpulling me away, I would have killed the bastard.." that left eye%rflashes and it's cleaer that she wants to taste some blood, "How's%rOzzle?" she asks with a grunt.

Troy spits out the Snow, that Stelita shoves into his. He Stands up%rand smiles holding his hand behind his back, he says "Now Sister..."%rhe grins "Thats no way to talk to my friend here." as he goes to bow%rdown, and give Drack an appology for crushing his Cherroot. He snakes%rhis hand up around Stelita's shoulder and returns the facewash. he%rpushes her into the snow. Jumping ontop of her he piles 3 or 4 hand%rfulls of snow into her face. He rolls off laughing, like a child.

Kaley sighs at the converstation is turned away from the point at%rhand. But she knows the scarred woman got her point, or she would%rstill be argueing over it. Thinking back to Ozzle, Kale shrugs. "I%rhaven't seen him much since I've been back. I suppose he's has grumpy%ras ever." She smiles, and decides not to chatise her friend for%rdrinking a bit much.

"REEAYYYAAHHHHHOOO!" Dracolysk belts out the war-cry and reaches down%rto grasp Troy bodily. Yanking him upwards off his Sister his starts to%rdrag him away, heading towards the fountain. With a grunt of effort he%rhefts Troy into the air and begins to heave him into the fountain.

Stelita reaches up, brushing the snow from her face. Her cheeks are%rred, and she grins and turns to watch Troy and Draco. Shaking her%rhead, she calls out. 'Hey! Don't make him freeze to death! Then the%rfun stops..."

Morganna leans down ansdd scoops up some snow, she pats it into a hard%rball and tosses it up and down in her hands, "Yeah, he's been alot%rgrumpier lately, but I don't mind.. look at me.." The Ambassador%rregards the snow for a moemnt and then, for whatever reason,reaches%rtowards kaley, pulls her towards her, and shoves the snowball down her%rback. The movement is very rough but effective.
An evil grin crosses Morganna's face and she snorts, "Diplomats are%rsubtle.. I think that was diplomatic.

Troy laughing as he is being carried away, he looks back to his%rsister. With that he reaches into his jacket pocket, where there is a%rlarge amout of snow build up. He Pulls out a large bit, but decides%rbetter on it. Instead he says to Drack "Ohhhh yeah get me wet, and my%rCigar will be ruined.." laughs "and then i can't pay yeah back."

Kaley punches Morganna in the stomach when the cold wetness touches%rher flesh. "What the fnark was that for?!" Quickly, she untucks her%rshirt beneath the heavy coat and tries her hardest to get the flakes%rout.

Dracolysk lets out a string of curses as Troy starts to assail him%rwith logic. With one final heft Hugo prepares to launch Troy into the%rfountain, his feet however have other ideas. Slipping on the slick,%ricy street besides the fountain they loose their grip and slide out%rfrom under him, sending Hugo falling on his ass. Troy falls from the%rair, landing ontop of Hugo and more and more curses in several%rdifferent languages pour from the businesmans mouth.
Leanna_Lar wanders thru the square slowlly trudging thru the snow, her%rhands burried deep in her jacket pockets, as she looks about, smiling%rslightly.

The ambassador makes a soft 'oof!' sound as the punch connects and she%rshrugs, dusting some snow off of her, "You hit like a girl, Kaley..%rI'll have to teach you to fight sometime.."The Ambassador smirks at%rher question and leans to one side drunkly, "I couldn't kill you, so I%rjust decided to piss you off.. I have to go sleep off this blasted%ralcohol.. say Hi to Oz for me if you see him.." she rubs her temples.

Troy laughing even more, he reaches to help up Drack but instead%rGreets the man with a hand'o'Snow. Stopping the round of cursing by%rfilling Dracks mouth with snow. He then Tries to stand up, and gets%rhis feet going. he makes for his sister "I'm not don with you yet%rsis!!"he shouts.

Stelita laughs at the two by the fountain, scrambling to her own feet%rafter a moment. Taking a run at the pair, she slides the last few%rfeet, doing her best to stop as Troy get's up, but not having any%rluck. She finally slips on the same ice Draco did, falling on her own%rbutt at Troy's feet.

Kaley rolls her eyes as the ambassador walks... er... fumbles away.%rLooking down at the snow, she considers... Nah, she'll get even later.%rWhen Morganna isn't really expecting it. "Sleep well, Princess." She%rcalls after the woman. Maybe that'll grind her nerves a little bit, a%rsmall victory.

The Ambassador raises an eyebrow and bows, an evil look on her face,%r"Didn't think I was royalty.." she mutters, stepping backwards and%rfalling onto her royal little bottom. She curses and slips to her%rfeet, muttering many profanities about the snow. Her muttered curses%rcease as she leaves the square to a drier, safer place.
